## Verification

- [ ] Lint, strict type checking, and tests
- [ ] Loading, empty, error, stale, offline, and unauthorized states as applicable
- [ ] API compatibility and secret review
- [ ] Accessibility and screenshots as applicable
- [ ] `docs/CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] Progress, traceability, milestone, and decision documents updated when facts changed

## Evidence
